headline: A Look At FactSet Research Systems (FDS) Valuation After Recent Volatile Share Price Moves
summary: Why FactSet Research Systems is on investors’ radar today FactSet Research Systems (FDS) is drawing attention after recent trading left the stock with mixed return patterns, prompting investors to reassess its valuation alongside the company’s revenue and net income profile. headline: ADP Employment, Retail Reports Knock Down Treasuries
summary: A stronger-than-expected reading on the labor market coupled with a solid reading on American spending turned the direction of the U.S. debt market.  Private employers added 62,000 jobs in March, according to the ADP report, above FactSet expectations for 38,500.  In February, private employers added 66,000 jobs.

headline: FDS Q1 Deep Dive: AI, Data Expansion, and Enterprise Contracts Drive Outperformance
summary: Financial data provider FactSet (NYSE:FDS) reported revenue ahead of Wall Street’s expectations in Q1 CY2026, with sales up 7.1% year on year to $611 million. The company expects the full year’s revenue to be around $2.46 billion, close to analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $4.46 per share was 1.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

headline: Wall Street Ends a Rough Quarter With Its Best Day, Iran Hope Ignites the Rally
summary: March 31 delivered the best single session for U.S. equities in nearly a year, as softening rhetoric from both Washington and Tehran raised real hopes that the five-week Iran war may finally be winding down.
